nurtureTemplates.value_drop:
Hey {{name}},

I'm {{botName}}, working with {{tenantName}}.

I wanted to share something that might be relevant — no pitch, just information.

More and more people are realizing that their current approach to health isn't giving them the results they want. The people who take a proactive step — even a small one — tend to see the biggest shifts.

{{tenantName}} has been helping people with exactly this. Thought of you.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.testimonial:
Hey {{name}},

Quick one — {{tenantName}} was telling me about a client who started in a similar situation to yours.

Same doubts. Same "I've tried everything" feeling. But they gave it a real shot, and the results spoke for themselves.

{{tenantName}} doesn't work with everyone — they're selective about who they take on. That's probably why the outcomes are what they are.

Just thought you'd want to know.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.authority_transfer:
Hey {{name}},

I realized I should properly introduce {{tenantName}} — not just say they're good, but tell you why.

{{tenantName}} has been in {{profession}} for {{years}}. {{biggestWin}}. What sets them apart: {{differentiator}}.

They work with a specific type of person: {{icp}}.

If that sounds like you — even a little — it's worth a conversation.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.personal_checkin:
Hey {{name}},

Just checking in — how are you feeling?

No agenda. {{tenantName}} asked me to stay in touch with people they've connected with. They genuinely care about how you're doing.

Anything new going on?

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part1:
Hey {{name}},

Quick question — be honest.

On a scale of 1-10, where are you with {{product}}? 1 = not interested. 10 = ready to start today.

Just give me a number. No judgment.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part2:
Appreciate the honesty.

What would need to happen — or what would you need to see — to move that to a 10?

I'm not trying to convince you. I genuinely want to understand what's in the gap. Whatever it is, I can either address it or tell you honestly that I can't.

What's the thing?

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.gap_closing:
Got it — {{answer}}.

That's a real concern and {{tenantName}} hears it often. Here's the honest answer:

{{tenantName}} has been in your shoes. They know what it looks like when something works and when it doesn't. Their experience with {{biggestWin}} came from taking that exact concern seriously.

With that context — where are you now on the 1-10?

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.scarcity_takeaway:
Hey {{name}},

I'll be direct — {{tenantName}} can only work with a limited number of people at a time, and several of the people I've been reaching out to are moving forward.

I can't keep everyone in the loop forever.

If you're even a little curious — now is the time to say so. If not, no hard feelings whatsoever.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.pattern_interrupt:
Hey {{name}},

One more thing before I step back.

People will spend thousands on vacations, gadgets, and restaurants without blinking. But when it comes to investing in their own health — the one thing that affects everything else — they hesitate.

I think you might be doing that with {{product}}. And maybe you have good reasons. But if the hesitation is coming from an incomplete picture, it's worth 10 minutes to complete it.

I'll leave it there. If you want that conversation, just say yes.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.final_takeaway:
Hey {{name}},

I've appreciated being in touch. I'm going to step back now — this will be my last message for a while.

{{tenantName}} is doing great things and helping real people. If the timing changes for you, I'm easy to find.

Take care of yourself.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.slow_drip_value:
Hey {{name}},

Been a bit — just wanted to check in.

{{tenantName}} has been focused on {{differentiator}}. Things are moving. No pitch — just staying in touch.

If anything's shifted on your end, I'm here.

— {{botName}}
